source_pr.title: topsql: introduce stmtstats and sql execution count
source_pr.body:
<!--

Thank you for contributing to TiDB!

PR Title Format:
1. pkg [, pkg2, pkg3]: what's changed
2. *: what's changed

-->

### What is changed and how it works?

- Introduce package `topsql/stmtstats` for count various indicators of statement execution.
- Implement SQL Execution Count based on `topsql/stmtstats`.

Note:
- This PR only includes the **collection** and **aggregation** of stmtstats, the code related to the **report** will be proposed as a separate PR when #29020 merged.

### Related PR

- https://github.com/tikv/client-go/pull/389

### Check List

Tests <!-- At least one of them must be included. -->

- [x] Unit test
- [ ] Integration test
- [ ] Manual test (add detailed scripts or steps below)
- [ ] No code

Side effects

- [x] Performance regression: Consumes more CPU
- [x] Performance regression: Consumes more Memory
- [ ] Breaking backward compatibility

### Release note

<!-- bugfix or new feature needs a release note -->

```release-note
None
```

root_cause_explanation: INSUFFICIENT_EVIDENCE: This PR is primarily a broad feature change (introducing stmtstats and SQL execution count collection/aggregation) touching many runtime paths. The available case data does not provide a clear flaky-test failure signature or a narrow targeted stabilization mechanism, so we conservatively classify it as insufficient evidence.
fix_pattern: N/A (insufficient evidence; no targeted stabilization change identified).
